core_mechanism: stagewise additive gradient boosting: greedily building an ensemble by fitting each successive weak learner (a regression/decision tree) to the negative gradient of a differentiable loss, so the summed model performs functional gradient descent toward a discrete label
brief_reason: The abstract states that among the models tested via cross-validation, Gradient Boosting (XGBoost) was the most reliable classifier, so the paper's method rests on the boosted additive-tree ensemble machinery.
